svg.title: A Knowledge Arc as a constellation of books connected by lines of resonance
svg.desc: Books appear as glyphs scattered across a dark field, each shape encoding a register. Thin lines of varying brightness connect books that speak to each other. A faint center of gravity marks the arc's question. Notebook marks and journal entries appear as small luminous points.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the arc question — how is it articulated and revised?')
sendPrompt('Show me journal entries near this constellation')
sendPrompt('Show me journal entries near this constellation')
sendPrompt('Show me journal entries near this constellation')
sendPrompt('What does Yumi see in this constellation?')

g.text: No fixed shape — the arc is whatever pattern these books make together
